distribution_position.note: NileLedger ranks at the 100.0th percentile across 2 companies by maturity proxy score.

competitor_gap.evidence_note: Capability gaps derived from public job post titles via structured data snapshot (data/jobs_snapshot.json). Same scoring function (github_activity_score + role count) as AI maturity pipeline.
competitor_gap.tone_note: Use neutral language focused on opportunity, not deficiency.
competitor_gap.sparse_sector_note: Sparse sector ('fintech'): only 0 same-industry peer(s) found; cross-sector peers used for ranking. Interpret capability gaps with caution.
